result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-snkutils [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  convert-from  convert from PKCS8 PEM formatted RSA private key. if password needed, read from stdin
  convert-to    convert snk to PKCS8 PEM RSA keypair included private key(no encryption)
  create        create snk file

Run 'dotnet-snkutils [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet-snkutils [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  convert-from  convert from PKCS8 PEM formatted RSA private key. if password needed, read from stdin
  convert-to    convert snk to PKCS8 PEM RSA keypair included private key(no encryption)
  create        create snk file

Run 'dotnet-snkutils [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
convert from PKCS8 PEM formatted RSA private key. if password needed, read from stdin

Usage: dotnet-snkutils convert-from [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  INPUT_PATH    input file path(PKCS8 PEM format)
  OUTPUT_PATH   output file path

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

result.stdout:
create snk file

Usage: dotnet-snkutils create [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  OUTPUT_PATH               path to output file(required)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information
  -b|--keybits <BITNUMBER>  number of key bits(default: 2048)
